creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
This issue has plagued me a lot over the years even to the point where I have stopped using it - until recently. I updated it to a recent FreeBSD 13.1 and it seems to be stable now!

Since I also tried various Linux variants back then and they all had to fight with instabilities / reboots I suspect that it was:

https://bugzilla.kernel.org/show_bug.cgi?id=109051

TL;DR hardware issue in Baytrail GPU which was worked around or fixed in drm/i915 in Linux Kernel 5.3
